name: O2Gold Inc.
summary: O2Gold Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of gold properties in Colombia. It holds a 50% interest in the La Pantera property located in the Bolivar region, Colombia; and interest in Otu Central gold project that consists of 26 mining claims located in the Segovia/Zaragoza regions of Antioquia in Colombia. The company was formerly known as Origin Gold Corporation and changed its name to O2Gold Inc. in January 2021. O2Gold Inc. is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
